name: Gong Dashboard Analysis & AskElephant Dashboard Strategy
description: Competitive research on Gong's dashboards and data visualization capabilities, gap analysis of AskElephant's current state, and a strategic plan with prototypes for adding role-based dashboards (user, manager, admin) that leverage our automation and CRM intelligence advantages.
next_steps: Review with Sam Ho (VP Product) for strategic alignment and prioritization
Validate data availability with Bryan/Kaden (talk ratio, question rate extractability)
Design review with Skylar/Adam on bento grid approach
Validate manager dashboard with Ben Kinard (coaching utility)
Validate admin dashboard with Rob (QBR/expansion utility)
Scope V1 engineering effort and timeline
